MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 1 DEGREE CONSTRUCTION, INC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Before the court is a Motion to be Relieved as Counsel from Counsel Willliam M. Miller, Tia M. Gonzalez and Buchalter, APC, counsel of record for Defendants 1 Degree Construction, Inc. and Thai Dave Gaon. The motion is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the motion is granted.

Prior to the time set for hearing, Moving Party must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org an updated proposed order on MC-053 with accurate information inserted, where appropriate. Note the Order will not be effective until Counsel files a Proof of Service of the executed order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Trial Date And Case Management Order.
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Text Ruling

Prior to Open Court, Atty. Tia Gonzalez appears. Counsel did not follow the tentative ruling rule and the court did not receive any notice to contest. Counsel informs the clerk there is an issue in Dept. 206. At the instruction of the court, the clerk informs counsel the matter does not belong in Dept. 302, the tentative ruling stands. Counsel to inform Dept. 206 re: trial date and Dept. 610 re: CMC.
